description_long: This is a wooden baseball bat with a natural brown finish, featuring a classic tapered cylindrical shape that widens at the barrel and narrows toward the handle. The bat is heavily modified with several large, dark metal spikes protruding from the barrel, giving it a menacing, weaponized appearance. The spikes are irregularly spaced and vary slightly in size, with some angled outward and others more perpendicular to the bat's surface. The handle is smooth and lacks any grip tape, maintaining the same wood texture and color as the rest of the bat. The end cap is rounded and integrated into the wood, with no distinct separation or additional material. There are no visible logos, markings, or decorative elements aside from the spikes.
description: A brown wooden baseball bat with multiple large metal spikes embedded in the barrel, giving it a rugged, weapon-like look. The handle is smooth and unadorned, and there are no visible logos or markings.
description_view_0: The bat is seen from a slight angle, showing the full length and several prominent metal spikes on the right side of the barrel.
description_view_1: This view shows the bat from the side, highlighting the alignment and spacing of the spikes along the barrel's edge.
description_view_2: The bat is viewed from the opposite side, displaying a different arrangement of spikes and the smooth, uninterrupted handle.
description_view_3: This angle reveals the left side of the bat, with spikes visible in profile and the rounded end cap clearly shown.
